title: Weather
tuningHighDa: High DA — less power. Consider leaning mixture.
tuningNegDa: Negative DA — more power. May need richer mixture.
tuningModerateDa: Moderate DA. Standard jetting should be close.
tuningHighHumidity: High humidity reduces effective air density.

dialog.errUnavailable: Weather is unavailable for this location right now.
dialog.errFetch: Failed to fetch weather data. Please try again.
dialog.errNotFound: Location not found. Try a different search term.
dialog.errGeoUnsupported: Geolocation is not supported by your browser.
dialog.errGeoDenied: Location access denied. Please allow GPS access and try again.
dialog.errGeoOther: Could not determine your location. Please try again.
dialog.tuningHighDa: High density altitude — engine produces less power. Consider leaning the carb mixture.
dialog.tuningNegDa: Negative density altitude — engine produces more power than standard. May need to richen mixture.
dialog.tuningModerateDa: Moderate density altitude. Standard jetting should be close.
dialog.tuningHighHumidity: High humidity further reduces effective air density.
